title: ''Programmer-fied'' Totem of Undying
description: Edits Jappa's Totem of Undying texture to fit better with the Programmer Art textures
body:
Personally, I use the Programmer Art textures for my Minecraft experience. However, there's one Jappa texture that I vastly prefer to the original: the Totem of Undying. I mean, just look how cute it is! If only there was a way to use the new Totem of Undying with the Programmer textures...

Well, now there is!

This resource pack edits Jappa's Totem of Undying texture to fit better with the Programmer Art textures, for those who prefer it.

There are two downloads. One is the normal version, and the other gives the Totem red eyes. This is for those who use Ruby Emeralds (https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ruby-emeralds-1-16/) and other similar mods.

This is my first Minecraft mod/resource pack, so constructive feedback is much appreciated.

Enjoy!
